content: Stripe billing with Next.js 2025: stripe npm package v22+ (pinned API 2025-12-15.clover). Pattern: Stripe Checkout for hosted payment page, webhooks for subscription state (customer.subscription.created/updated/deleted), stripe listen --forward-to localhost for dev. Key pitfall: never trust client-side success page — always gate access from webhook state. Use stripe-js @stripe/stripe-js for frontend. Vercel's nextjs-subscription-payments template is the canonical reference. Freemium tier: assign free/paid product IDs, check subscription status from DB on each request.
